events.name: Detroit Pistons at New York Knicks

headlines.description: — Cade Cunningham wasn't thinking about himself after the first postseason victory of his career. His focus was on all the Detroit fans who stuck by the Pistons during 17 years since the last one.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pistons snap NBA-record, 15-game postseason losing streak, beating Knicks 100-94 in Game 2

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored 39 points on 15-of-19 shooting and the Los Angeles Clippers evened their first-round playoff series against the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Kawhi Leonard's 39 points lead Clippers to a 105-102 win over Nuggets to even series 1-1
